scripts.api:generate: npm run api:export && openapi-typescript openapi.json -o lib/api/generated.ts
scripts.api:check: npm run api:generate && git diff --exit-code -- openapi.json lib/api/generated.ts
scripts.test:unit: tsc components/audio/listeningProgress.ts components/audio/playerMachine.ts components/audio/playerResources.ts lib/api/account-auth-state.ts lib/api/auth-refresh.ts lib/api/auth.ts --outDir .next-codex-unit --target es2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --pretty false && node --test components/audio/*.test.cjs lib/api/*.test.cjs
